name: claude-code-studio-next
description: Tauri desktop studio for Claude Code providers, skills, MCP, projects, and runners.
author: Jevil

scripts.tauri:build: npm run prepare:runtime && tauri build --bundles nsis
scripts.tauri:build:macos: npm run prepare:runtime && tauri build --bundles dmg,app
scripts.tauri:build:linux: npm run prepare:runtime && tauri build --bundles appimage,deb
scripts.check: node --check src/db.js && node --check src/db/backup.js && node --check src/db/connection.js && node --check src/db/providers.js && node --check src/db/skills.js && node --check src/db/mcp.js && node --check src/db/sessionIndex.js && node --check src/skill-categories.js && node --check src/identities.js && node --check src/provider-presets.js && node --check src/event-bus.js && node --check src/backend-host.mjs && node --check src/claude-setup.js && node --check src/runner/ClaudeRunner.js && node --check src/runner/claudeArgs.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/i18n.js && node --check public/markdown.js && node --check public/tauri-bridge.js && node --check public/ui/helpers.js && node --check public/ui/modal.js && node --check public/ui/state.js && node --check public/ui/api.js && node --check public/ui/bridge.js && node --check public/ui/data-loader.js && node --check public/ui/context-footer.js && node --check public/ui/messages.js && node --check public/ui/project-nav.js && node --check public/ui/search.js && node --check public/ui/dropdowns.js && node --check public/ui/chat-engine.js && node --check public/ui/bootstrap.js && node --check public/ui/setup.js && node --check public/ui/settings/index.js && node --check public/ui/settings/providers.js && node --check public/ui/settings/identities.js && node --check public/ui/settings/skills.js && node --check public/ui/settings/mcp.js && node --check public/ui/settings/plugins.js && node --check public/ui/settings/runners.js && node --check public/ui/settings/usage.js && node --check public/ui/settings/diagnostics.js && node --check public/ui/settings/general.js && node --check public/ui/settings/settings-helpers.js && node --check scripts/release-check.mjs && node --check scripts/package-portable.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-node-runtime.mjs
